name: @pearces/react-ws-hook
description: A custom react hook to communicate over websockets
author: Stephen Pearce (https://github.com/pearces)

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run unit
scripts.build:module: tsc --module es2022 --moduleResolution bundler --project tsconfig.build.json --outDir lib/mjs && tsc-alias --outDir lib/mjs && node utils/copy.cjs static/package.mjs.json lib/mjs/package.json
scripts.build:node: tsc --module commonjs --project tsconfig.build.json --outDir lib/cjs && node utils/copy.cjs static/package.cjs.json lib/cjs/package.json
scripts.generate:types: tsc --module es2022 --moduleResolution bundler --project tsconfig.build.json --removeComments false --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir lib
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:module && npm run build:node && npm run generate:types
